nodes.label: FinCalc Suite
nodes.description: A static, no-build-step PWA offering ~20 Indian personal finance calculators. Deployed to GitHub Pages.

nodes.label: Progressive Web App
nodes.description: Technology used to provide offline functionality and app-like experience.

nodes.label: Tailwind CSS v4
nodes.description: Utility-first CSS framework used for styling with custom theme tokens.

nodes.label: Chart.js
nodes.description: CDN-loaded library for rendering interactive donut and bar charts.

nodes.label: ES Modules
nodes.description: Native JavaScript modules used for structuring business logic and UI helpers.

nodes.label: GitHub Pages
nodes.description: Static hosting platform for the FinCalc application.

nodes.label: CLAUDE.md
nodes.description: Project overview, architecture guide, and commands for Claude Code.

nodes.label: Home (index.html)
nodes.description: Main hub and landing page for the calculator suite.

nodes.label: robots.txt
nodes.description: Instructions for search engine crawlers.

nodes.label: sitemap.xml
nodes.description: XML sitemap for search engine indexing.

nodes.label: manifest.webmanifest
nodes.description: PWA manifest defining app name, icons, and theme colors.

nodes.label: service-worker.js
nodes.description: Caches static assets for offline use using a hardcoded OFFLINE_URLS list.

nodes.label: finance.js
nodes.description: Core business logic module containing pure functions for EMI, SIP, Tax, etc.

nodes.label: ui.js
nodes.description: Shared DOM helpers and Chart.js integration, specifically for prepayment schedules.

nodes.label: util.js
nodes.description: Common utilities for number formatting (INR), date manipulation, and type conversion.

nodes.label: app.js
nodes.description: Application shell logic: theme toggle, service-worker registration, and PWA prompts.

nodes.label: src/input.css
nodes.description: Tailwind source file containing custom variants and component classes.

nodes.label: styles.css
nodes.description: Compiled Tailwind CSS output file used in production.

nodes.label: Loans & Repayment
nodes.description: Category for tools related to debt and repayment strategies.

nodes.label: Investment & Savings
nodes.description: Category for wealth creation and interest-bearing savings tools.

nodes.label: Financial Planning
nodes.description: Category for long-term goal planning and tax estimation.

nodes.label: Affordability Calculator
nodes.description: Determines maximum eligible loan based on income and FOIR ratios.

nodes.label: Balance Transfer Calculator
nodes.description: Compares current loan vs new lender to find savings and break-even points.

nodes.label: CAGR Calculator
nodes.description: Calculates Compound Annual Growth Rate for investments.

nodes.label: Education Loan Calculator
nodes.description: Plans EMIs with moratorium period and grace period calculations.

nodes.label: EMI Calculator
nodes.description: Standard loan EMI calculator with amortization schedule and charts.

nodes.label: Fixed Deposit Calculator
nodes.description: Calculates FD maturity with various compounding frequencies.

nodes.label: Gratuity Calculator
nodes.description: Calculates employee gratuity based on salary and service years.

nodes.label: GST Calculator
nodes.description: Calculates exclusive and inclusive GST amounts.

nodes.label: Income Tax Calculator
nodes.description: Compares Old vs New tax regimes for FY 2024-25.

nodes.label: Inflation Calculator
nodes.description: Shows impact of inflation on future costs and purchasing power.

nodes.label: Lumpsum Calculator
nodes.description: Projects compound growth of one-time investments.

nodes.label: Mutual Fund Returns
nodes.description: Estimates returns with CAGR and tax implications (LTCG/STCG).

nodes.label: POMIS Calculator
nodes.description: Calculates income from Post Office Monthly Income Scheme.

nodes.label: PPF Calculator
nodes.description: Public Provident Fund returns with yearly compounding logic.

nodes.label: Prepayment Calculator
nodes.description: Optimizes loan tenure or EMI reduction via prepayments.

nodes.label: RD Calculator
nodes.description: Calculates Recurring Deposit maturity with quarterly compounding.

nodes.label: Retirement Planner
nodes.description: Determines required retirement corpus and necessary SIP.

nodes.label: SIP Calculator
nodes.description: Standard Systematic Investment Plan calculator with growth charts.

nodes.label: SSY Calculator
nodes.description: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana maturity estimator.

nodes.label: Step-Up SIP Calculator
nodes.description: Models SIP with annual percentage or amount increments.
